message:
✨ Add modals to UnifiedDashboard for add/configure cards (#683)

Integrates existing AddCardModal and ConfigureCardModal into
UnifiedDashboard component:

- Add handleAddCard to open AddCardModal for adding new cards
- Add handleConfigureCard to open ConfigureCardModal for editing
- Handle card addition from AddCardModal suggestions
- Handle saving card configuration changes
- Pass existing card types to prevent duplicates

This completes Phase 4 of the unified framework activation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
